title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Luffy, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Alright, I can reach it form here

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nooo wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: waah, what's with the huge creatures down there

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kin'emon and the others went up there to fight Kaido

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if I'm gonna let you do as you please!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we're not going anywhere with them around!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So even the sky is so heavily guarded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Mad because we can't operate it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The durability of this stinking suit really pisses me off

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: General Chopper who served as a decoy for us has come falling from the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Straw Hatman is going down too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite all this... for some reason... I don't feel like we're losing!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
